Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brake part details to provide fresh marketing content context.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification (make, model, year, and any additional parameters) through a HubSpot form, triggering the workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Gives Mark a simple, repeatable way to request a catalog lookup without needing any system access or technical knowledge.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream system for all DFC parts that match the submitted vehicle spec, returning both stocked items and gaps in inventory coverage.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly surfaces what DFC has and what's missing for a given vehicle without requiring a manual catalog search across multiple product lines.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the Dream inventory results into a structured, labeled Excel-ready data set, cleanly separating stocked parts from inventory gaps.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Removes the manual formatting work so Mark receives a polished, presentation-ready file rather than a raw data dump.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment, along with a brief summary of stocked versus missing parts.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark within minutes of submission, enabling faster special markets quoting and customer response.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the backorder report, returning on-hand quantities, on-order quantities, and in-transit shipment data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, giving everyone the same accurate, real-time inventory picture simultaneously.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the existing backorder report, enriching each line item and flagging parts with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead-ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a live, prioritized action document, immediately identifying which customer situations are urgent versus resolvable.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for flagged backorder situations, including dead-end notifications and ETA updates pre-populated with live data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts hours of individual customer follow-up into a single automated send, ensuring customers receive timely, accurate updates without staff manually composing each message.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference in minutes instead of days of manual catalog review across three separate vendor sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which vehicles are already covered and which represent inventory gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Pinpoints exactly where DFC has two-piece rotor coverage and where new product development or sourcing opportunities exist.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments where DFC currently has no coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signal data from actual buyers to prioritize which inventory gaps are worth filling, replacing assumptions with evidence.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitments, DFC cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers one clean, decision-ready reference document that consolidates the entire market landscape, enabling faster and more confident product strategy decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy across campaigns, extracting headlines, body text, and CTA fields for phrase scanning.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete ad copy coverage in a single pull, ensuring no active ad escapes the compliance or quality review.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field for the specified target phrases and compiles a flagged list identifying the exact ad, field, and matching text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a problematic or targeted phrase across potentially hundreds of ads in seconds, with pinpoint accuracy that manual review cannot match.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted report listing every flagged ad with the platform, ad ID, field name, and exact copy where each target phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable compliance or quality report on demand without requiring anyone to manually audit ad accounts.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox, ingests incoming application emails, and extracts attached resume files and applicant details for processing.
Resume Bot.impact: Captures every inbound application automatically so no candidate falls through the cracks during high-volume hiring periods.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive, organized by role and applicant name for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable applicant file system without any manual saving or organizing by the hiring team.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the open role it was submitted for, classifying candidates as Approved, Denied, or Pending based on fit.
Resume Bot.impact: Reduces initial resume screening from hours to seconds per candidate, letting recruiters focus time only on qualified applicants.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant with their score, decision, role, and Drive file link into the hiring dashboard, routing paused-role candidates to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time, organized view of all applicants and decisions without manual data entry, while keeping paused candidates accessible for future openings.

summary: The AI automation pipeline remains strong with 56 total agents — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline held steady across the board. The team continues to build on a solid foundation of live, running automations while several key projects move through development. Great work to everyone keeping the momentum going — more updates to come as in-progress agents push toward completion!
